artifacts.claim_boundary: This witness binds the immutable target-owned native receipt to its exact run, checks, and non-calibration native obligations; it does not prove post-run finalization.

claim_boundary: SkillGuard supervises the complete native kb-sleep-maintenance route, all target-specific obligations, and the sole current enforced closure. It cannot create a parallel executor or certify future runs.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: Only exact current receipts for the target skill's declared checks are supervised. The target skill retains all domain judgment, including positive/shallow behavior and conditional update finalization.

functions.business_intent: Consume new evidence incrementally, own every durable knowledge-lifecycle decision, and publish the sole canonical LogicGuard model generation.

obligations.description: Acquire or safely recover the lane, then read only actionable work after the committed watermark while skipping already-terminal history.
Give every admitted observation one durable current disposition through one bounded lifecycle batch.
Resolve candidates through bounded evidence-backed terminal or reopenable outcomes.
Use verified outcomes and contradictions for promotion, suspension, and downgrade through one shared evidence index per review cycle.

Represent every admitted card as an exact LogicGuard model revision with a root claim, context and method, typed support or challenge nodes, and an explicit disposition ledger for gaps instead of invented support.
Assemble exact model revisions into a scoped ModelMesh and admit canonical cross-model relations only with qualifying non-AI provenance; co-use and legacy links remain unresolved proposals.
Consume each typed Dream handoff at most once.
Publish the complete model, mesh, deterministic projection, active index, generation manifest, and pointer as one rollbackable generation with the pointer last.
Publish a validated active index and advance the watermark only after durable success.
Keep the watermark unchanged and report failure on any blocker.
On timeout terminate the complete owned process tree, prove zero descendants, and preserve parent cleanup margin.
Reject shallow proposal-only completion and require the full native receipt.

action.summary: Load the target-owned inputs and prove every intake obligation before mutation.
Run the native automation owner through every declared execution branch.
Require the current terminal receipt plus positive and shallow target-owned checks before closure.
